Tests for app message receiver, sender, and session capabilities, plus a build script for testing.


## Files
- **[test_app_message_receiver.c](test_app_message_receiver.c.md)**: Tests for the app message receiver functionality in the Pebble firmware, including handling of message reception, buffer management, and error scenarios.
- **[test_app_message_sender.c](test_app_message_sender.c.md)**: Tests for the app message sender functionality in the Pebble firmware, including session management and message handling.
- **[test_app_session_capabilities.c](test_app_session_capabilities.c.md)**: Tests for app session capabilities in the Pebble firmware, using fakes and stubs for session management.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for testing app message components in the Pebble firmware.
